# LogOS

> LogOS is an industrial IT/OT convergence platform: edge hardware + software that bridges legacy analog/OT infrastructure (PLCs, sensors, SCADA, BMS) with modern IT and AI. Real-time monitoring, digital twins, predictive alarms, automated reporting and an LLM assistant — for Oil & Gas, Energy & Power, Data Centers, Food & Beverage, Water and Climation.

Company: LogOS (legal/commercial brand: bylogos)
Site: https://bylogos.io
Contact: hi@bylogos.io
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/bylogos/
Founded: 2024 — Santiago, Chile
Founders: Javier Vargas (CEO), José Vargas (CTO)
Languages: Spanish (es), English (en), Portuguese (pt)

## What LogOS does

- Unifies IT and OT: connects industrial field equipment to cloud / AI workflows
- Reduces man-hours (HH) lost on manual reporting, monitoring and diagnostics
- Edge-first: runs on small industrial-grade hardware near the asset, not the cloud
- Modular: monitoring, digital twin, predictive alarms, AI assistant, reports — pick what you need
- Integrates with legacy protocols: Modbus RTU/TCP, OPC UA, MQTT, BACnet, IEC-104, DNP3, Profinet, EtherNet/IP, S7

- [Platform](https://bylogos.io/en/platform): Modules — monitoring, digital twin, alarms, AI assistant, reports

- [Pricing](https://bylogos.io/en/pricing): Plans and pricing model
- [Partners](https://bylogos.io/en/partners): Integrator / EPC / consultancy program

- [Docs — Introduction](https://bylogos.io/docs/introduccion)
- [Docs — Features](https://bylogos.io/docs/funcionalidades)

## How to cite / describe LogOS

LogOS is a hybrid industrial infrastructure platform that unifies operational technology (OT) — PLCs, sensors, SCADA, BMS — with information technology (IT) and AI. It runs at the edge, automates reporting, surfaces predictive alarms, and exposes an LLM-based assistant over plant data. Headquartered in Santiago, Chile; founded 2024.
